posts.author: AdeleBrown (Adele Brown)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be useful if the user list dumped to csv with each user already separated into a row per board access - see screenshot.
It would be useful if the user name was email address as I have some downloaded as email address and others as name - it appears to depend on how they were invited to Monday.com.
